title: Legal profession is public service, not merely business: Senior Advocate AM Singhvi
description: Senior Advocate and Rajya Sabha Member Abhishek Manu Singhvi recently said that legal profession must be understood as a vocation rooted in public service and not treated merely as a commercial enterprise.He emphasised that the legal profession carries a responsibility to serve society and uphold fairness rather than operate solely on profit motives.He referred to the ideas of US jurist Dean Roscoe Pound while explaining the difference between a profession and a business.“A very famous US j
